info.title: Apache NiFi REST API
info.description: Apache NiFi is a data integration tool providing a REST API for managing dataflows, processors, connections, controller services, and system operations. The API manages the full lifecycle of NiFi components.

post.description: Creates a token for accessing the REST API via username/password

delete.description: Performs a logout for other providers that have been issued a token by Apache NiFi

get.description: Retrieves the controller level about info

get.summary: Get the status of the flow
get.description: Gets the current status of this NiFi
Gets status for a process group
Performs a search against this NiFi using the specified query
Gets the current status of the cluster
Retrieves the user identity of the user making the request
Gets all processors in a process group
Gets all connections in a process group

post.description: Creates a new remote process group

get.description: Gets controller services for given process group

put.description: Updates run status of a processor (start/stop)

get.description: Gets the state for a processor
Gets diagnostics information about a processor

put.description: Updates run status of a controller service

get.description: Gets references for a controller service

put.description: Updates run status of an input port
Updates run status of an output port

get.description: Gets the diagnostics for the system NiFi is running on
Gets the current counters for this NiFi

put.description: Updates run status of a reporting task
